input_text: Mark is not in the box. Earth contains Europe. The white mouse is strong. Penguins are birds. The letter was written. The song was sung by Mary. The book was read by Sara. The picture was painted by Leo. Sue is a true patriot. Apparently, Tom left early. The nice Emajogi is 80 kilometers long. Mr Dursley is a catholic. Unexpectedly, the door opened. No elephant is an animal. John's sister laughed. The ball was kicked by Mike. Dr. Smith, a surgeon, entered the room. The teacher showed the students a map. Winona is a sheep. Eve planned to travel. Baby bears do not eat berries. Cities in Estonia are estonian. Muggles cannot disappear. The glass was broken by the boy. Clinton defeated Dole. The chef cooked a meal for the guests. Emily is a cat. A hand of a man moved a wheel. Tallinn is hardly in Latvia. The length of Nile is 10 meters. If X1 is a father of Y1, Y1 is a child of X1. The bike is small. The horse kept in the stable was calm. Some elephant is an animal?
